title: Keto Kenyan Fish Curry
description: A low-carb and flavorful Kenyan-inspired fish curry recipe, perfect for a keto diet.
instructions: 1. Heat 1 tablespoon of coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the fish and cook until browned on both sides, about 3-4 minutes per side.
3. Remove the fish from the skillet and set aside.
4. Reduce heat to medium and add the remaining 1 tablespoon of coconut oil.
5. Add the curry powders and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
6. Add the lime juice and cook for an additional minute.
7. Return the fish to the skillet and spoon some of the curry sauce over the top.
8. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
9. Serve immediately, garnished with fresh cilantro (optional).
